title: loading more than 2147483647 rows gives issue.
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE test_table (id SERIAL PRIMARY KEY, name VARCHAR(255), created_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP);
CREATE TABLE another_table (value INT, description TEXT, is_active BOOLEAN DEFAULT TRUE);
INSERT INTO another_table (value, description) SELECT id, 'Description ' || id FROM test_table WHERE id < 2147483647;
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM another_table WHERE value IS NOT NULL;
